_comment: Serial NRZ eye fixture: a 160-UI PRBS stream (7-bit LFSR) at a 2000ns unit interval, Q1.15 analog level on `sample` with a 1-bit `sclk` rising once per UI at the ideal boundary. Transitions are centered on the UI boundaries with seeded timing jitter (±0.08 UI) and amplitude noise (±0.05), giving a measurable but non-ideal eye. Bind sample→sample, uiClock→sclk; decode as fixed-point Q1.15. For the fixed-period variant bind only sample, set uiSource=fixedPeriod, uiPeriod=2000. The expected mid-UI eye height/width below are computed by an independent reference fold over the continuous analog signal (not the widget). Regenerate with dart run tool/generate_dsp_fixtures.dart (both trees).
